# Expense Lite AI

> Expense Lite AI is a personal finance platform for expense tracking, EMI and loan management, monthly planning, split expenses, bank accounts, credit cards, and AI-assisted financial lookup.

## Canonical Site
- https://expenselyt.com/

## Public Pages
- Home: https://expenselyt.com/
- Contact: https://expenselyt.com/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://expenselyt.com/privacy-policy
- Terms and Conditions: https://expenselyt.com/terms-and-conditions

## Product Summary
- Track personal expenses and categorize spending
- Manage EMIs, recurring payments, and monthly due planning
- Monitor bank accounts and credit cards
- Split expenses with friends
- Use AI-powered financial lookup features

## Crawl Guidance
- Public marketing and policy pages may be indexed and summarized
- Authenticated app pages, shared private data, and API routes should not be indexed

## Contact
- Email: hims.sharma23@gmail.com
